features.name: Benchling App
features.description: Top-level Datagrok application and tree-browser panel that surfaces all Benchling LIMS data through a unified UI entry point under the Chem menu.
features.evidence_summary: Both functions share the 'Benchling' name root and explicit app/appTreeBrowser roles, plus the package-level readme and developer guide describe the same entry point.

features.name: Sequence Management
features.description: Read and create amino-acid (AA) and DNA sequences stored in Benchling, returning structured dataframes for downstream analysis in Datagrok.
features.evidence_summary: All four functions share the 'AA Sequence' / 'DNA Sequence' name root and form a symmetric Get/Create CRUD pair for biological sequences.

features.name: DNA Oligo Management
features.description: Retrieve and register short DNA oligonucleotide entries in Benchling, enabling oligo inventory and design workflows from within Datagrok.
features.evidence_summary: Functions share the 'DNA Oligo' name root with a Get/Create CRUD pattern, backed by platform oligo-toolkit and oligonucleotide-design help pages.

features.name: Assay Data Access
features.description: Fetch and create assay results and assay runs from Benchling, allowing scientists to pull experimental outcome data into Datagrok for visualization and analysis.
features.evidence_summary: All four functions share the 'Assay' name root and form symmetric Get/Create CRUD pairs for Benchling assay objects.

features.name: Molecule Registry
features.description: Search and register small-molecule entities in the Benchling registry, bridging Benchling compound records with Datagrok chemical analytics.
features.evidence_summary: Get/Create Molecule pair with shared 'Molecule' name root targeting the Benchling registry, placed under the Chem browse path of the app.

features.name: Plate Management
features.description: Query and create lab plates in Benchling, giving Datagrok users visibility into physical sample containers and enabling plate-based workflows.
features.evidence_summary: Get/Create Plate pair shares the 'Plate' name root; platform Plates package docs are loosely related as they describe analogous plate concepts.

features.name: Mixture Management
features.description: Retrieve and create mixture (formulation) records from Benchling, supporting compound formulation and sample preparation tracking inside Datagrok.
features.evidence_summary: Get/Create Mixture pair shares the 'Mixture' name root targeting the Benchling Mixtures API.

features.name: Project Management
features.description: List Benchling projects accessible to the authenticated user, enabling project-scoped browsing and filtering of LIMS entities within Datagrok.
features.evidence_summary: Get Projects function shares the 'Projects' name root with internal test and tutorial docs for project browsing; the deprecated create-project page is weakly related.
